author: vvo
subject: fix: change the default hierarchical facet behavior
body:
To ease navigation, we always:
  - provide the root level categories
  - provide the current refinement sub categories (`fruits > citrus > *`:
  n + 1)
  - provide the parent refinement (`fruits > citrus` => `fruits`: n -1)
  categories
  - refine the search using the current hierarchical refinement
